research_boundary: Research use only. Not for diagnosis, treatment, cure claims, prescribing, clinical deployment, regulatory compliance, or drug-safety certification.

competent_reader_input.claim_text: Ranolazine is primarily a late-INa (INaL) blocker with modest IKr activity; has anti-anginal mechanism via reducing intracellular Na+/Ca2+ overload.

scorecard_calibration.rationale: INaL primary mechanism is well-known; multi-current framing is common. No falsifier discipline; no contradictions in standard literature.
